text: Hello. What do you want? Hi. My name is Ayla. I'm calling about the final expense insurance options that may help cover funeral, burial, or cremation costs. To check basic eligibility, so can you please confirm, are you between 40 and 85 years old? I'm 59. Perfect. You're qualified for the low cost. No, I'm not. I'm not insurance plans. Let me connect you to the plan specialist please stay on the line.
